name: Rename layers inline - Jitter
snippet: It is now possible to rename your layers by double-clicking on the layer name in the layer list. This also works for most animations in the timeline.

name: Renaming layers - Sketch
snippet: When you select a layer in the Layer List, you can use Edit > Rename or press ⌘ R to rename it, like you would with a file in Finder.
